title: T'less
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{GAreview}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=T'less |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=She/her{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]] |caste=[[Shamed Ones]] |domain= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|This is not the time nor the place. We are due back in—''"
"''You go, T'less. Tell Sh'simm we were held up in the yorik nursery. This is more important.|T'less and Shoon-mi Esh|}} '''T'less''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] who belonged to the [[Shamed Ones]]. Alive during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], T'less worked on the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]] and secretly practiced the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]], a belief that members of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] would save lowly Yuuzhan Vong. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], she, alongside Shamed Ones [[Shoon-mi Esh]] and [[Aarn]], met briefly with the rogue Shamed One [[Vuurok I'pan]], who had brought fellow Yuuzhan Vong [[Nom Anor|Ammorn]] to learn new knowledge about the [[New Jedi Order|''Jeedai'']] heresy from the three. However, T'less left before Aarn and Esh did to provide an excuse for their absence. ==Biography== {{Quote|Aarn, T'less, Shoon-mi. I have brought someone who wishes to learn more about the ''Jeedai''.|I'pan, at the beginning of the meeting|}} [[File:Coruscant-EotE.jpg|thumb|left|220px|T'less resided on Yuuzhan'tar by the time of the Yuuzhan Vong War.]] T'less, a [[Gender/Legends|female]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]], belonged to the [[Shamed Ones]], a [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|caste]] of those deemed imperfect by other Yuuzhan Vong. She lived during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], when her species invaded the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates thr events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. T'less worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]], which had been [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]] from the New Republic earlier in the war.''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' A secret member of the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]]—a belief among lowly Yuuzhan Vong, such as the Shamed Ones, that the members of the [[New Jedi Order]] would save them—T'less operated under the cover of legitimate work. T'less, alongside fellow Shamed Ones and [[Jedi/Legends|''Jeedai'']] heresy believers [[Shoon-mi Esh]] and [[Aarn]], traveled to meet the rogue Shamed One [[Vuurok I'pan]], who was bringing another Yuuzhan Vong who wished to know more about the heresy. T'less and the others traveled to a subbasement on Yuuzhan'tar, where they found I'pan and his companion, [[Nom Anor|Ammorn]], who was, unbeknownst to the three, the disgraced [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]] Nom Anor. However, when Esh and Ammorn started to discuss the heresy, T'less grew nervous. Believing that they would be discovered by Yuuzhan Vong authorities who forbade the practice of the heresy and that they would be late for another engagement, she voiced her concerns. Esh then ordered T'less to go inform [[Sh'simm]] that he and Aarn had been held up in the [[yorik coral]] [[Nurse/Legends|nursery]] to explain their absence, and T'less left the meeting to go do so. ==Personality and traits== As a Shamed One, T'less was considered untouchable by the rest of the Yuuzhan Vong castes. She embraced the ''Jeedai'' heresy and was willing to operate undercover while working. However, T'less grew nervous and became concerned that she and her companions would be caught during their underground meeting on Yuuzhan'tar, prompting Esh to send her away, as he and Aarn were more devoted to the heresy than she was and more willing to risk exposure. Amorrn found that T'less carried around with her an air of toil. ==Behind the scenes== T'less appeared only in [[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant|''Force Heretic I: Remnant'']], a [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] installment released in [[2003]] and written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=T'less |es=T'less }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Jeedai Heretics]] [[Category:Shamed Ones]]
